pi_items.source: task.json instructions and verifier.py status check
setup_task.sh generation script and export_result.sh query
setup_task.sh writes https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ and verifier.py checks for it
task.json instructions and verifier.py regex check

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a published WordPress page titled 'Urban Photography Book Launch'. The agent must upload a synthetically generated background image named 'hero-bg.jpg' and assemble Gutenberg blocks, including a video embed with a 'youtube.com/watch' URL, and a CTA button linking to '/checkout/' with the text 'Pre-order Now'. All assets are generated synthetically by the setup script.
